allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Optidriver MVP\\optidriver-mvp" -Exclude node_modules | Select-Object Name, LastWriteTime, @{N='Size';E={if\($_.PSIsContainer\){'<dir>'}else{$_.Length}}}, Mode)
